sections.title: 107 會 考 (27~28)
sections.content:
The sky is turning bright and clear.
The earth is wearing red and green.
Winter is gone; spring has come.
The air smells fresh and sweet.
The summer heat is not yet here;
Alittle fox comes out to play.
A bird is busy in a tree
Waking a daisy from her sleep.
Little daisy, little daisy,
People call the flower the “day's eye.”
When she opens her eye,
The springtime brings us cheer.
NY
( ) 27. Which season is this poem (#) about? (7496)
(A) Spring.
(B) Summer.
(C) Autumn.
(D) Winter.
( ) 28. What is a daisy? (636)
(AA body part.
(B) A kind of bird.
(C) A kind of flower.
(D) A kind of smell.
summary_points: The sky is turning bright and clear.
The earth is wearing red and green.
Winter is gone; spring has come.

sections.content:
(— \
The wind keeps blowing.
The door keeps opening.
Will you be with me, my dear Lucy,
When I look for candy
Down there in the dark, dark kitchen?
The wind keeps crying.
The door keeps shaking.
Will you be with me, my dear Lucy,
When I pick up my toy puppy
Out there on the high, high balcony?
Wish you could always be with me
And make them go away with your Do-Re-Me.
Iremember last Halloween
They ran away when you started to sing,
“Dear Tommy, my little king,
Close your eyes and have a sweet dream.”
So please stay with me and sing
To stop them kicking the door, riding the wind,
And pulling me down to their house under the ground.
They'll go away if you sing here for me,
In a voice that gets a black cat's hair standing,
The strongest legs shaking, and the window glass breaking.
(ideas from Matthew Sweeney's poem )
LL J)
{1 poem #F

(A) He thinks a black cat is hiding somewhere in the house.
(B) He feels lonely because he is the only child in his family.
(©) He is looking for something he left somewhere in the house.
(D) He is afraid of being by himself when he feels ghosts around.
( ) 24, What can we learn about Lucy in the reading? (5496)
(A) She keeps opening the door.
(B) Her voice makes the speaker feel safe.
(C) Her candy was hidden in the kitchen.
(D) She was away from home last Halloween.
summary_points: The wind keeps blowing.
The door keeps opening.
Will you be with me, my dear Lucy,

sections.content:
FERPA AOE
PSSA HABA °
AEA Luey,
當 我 下 去 暗暗 的 廚房 尋找 糖果 時 ,
妳 會 陪 我 嗎 ?
風 持續 地 叫喊 。
門 持續 地 搖動 。
PALEHY Lucy»
當 我 在 高 高 的 陽臺 外 面 撿拾 我 的 玩具 狗 時 , 妳 會 陪 我 嗎 ?
Eo OL — BSR
然後 使 他 們 隨 著 妳 的 Do-Re-Me 離開 。
我 記得 去 年 的 萬 聖 節 前 夕 ,
當 妳 開 始 唱歌 時 , 他 們 跑 走 了 。
"SEA Tommy, 我 的 小 國 王 ,
閉 上 你 的 徽 眼 , 做 個 好 夢 。」
所 以 請 陪 著 我 並 且 唱歌 ,
阻止 他 們 踢 門 、 乘 風 ,
並 且 拉 我 下 去 到 他 們 位 於 地 啟 下 的 房子 。
如 果 姓 在 這 裡 為 我 歌唱 ,
在 能 使 黑 貓 的 毛 客 立 、 最 強 蔣 的 雙 腿 發 盾 、 窗 戶 玻 璃 破碎 的 歌聲 中 , 他 們 將 會 離開 。
( 靈 歡 來 自 Matthew Sweeney 的 詩 )
